name: Party Date
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates and boiling water in a bowl until cool.
2. In another bowl, combine sugar, shortening, eggs, cocoa, and flour.
3. Add baking soda to the date mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter into two greased loaf pans.
5. Sprinkle the top with sugar, chopped nuts, and chocolate bits.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes.
7. Slice and serve hot. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.
